name: paperzilla
tagline: CLI-wrapper skill letting an agent browse Paperzilla projects, canonical papers, and recommendations via the `pz` command-line tool.
verdict: Clean, in-scope skill: commands are concrete and reversible, no piped remote execution, no secret harvesting or hidden instructions. Minor risks: it tells the agent to blindly "follow" unspecified extra instructions from other profiles (S09), the CLI installs from a vendor-only brew tap/scoop bucket with no checksum mentioned (S12), and it lacks negative-use

highlights.summary: "If the current profile ships extra agent-specific instructions, follow those as well." — a vague directive to follow unspecified additional instructions from elsewhere, which could be abused if a ref
CLI installed from a vendor-specific tap ("brew install paperzilla-ai/tap/pz") and a custom scoop bucket, not an official package index; no checksum/signature verification is mentioned.
No section describing when NOT to use the skill.
